Technology & Equipments

Innovation isn't just about cool gadgets—it's about providing you with safer, faster, and more comfortable treatments.

Digital X-Rays

  • 90% less radiation exposure than traditional film X-rays
  • Instant results available for patient review on chairside monitors
  • Environmentally friendly with no chemical processing required

3D Cone Beam CT Scanner

  • Provides a comprehensive 3D view of teeth, bone, and nerves
  • Essential for precise dental implant planning and safety
  • Helps identify hidden infections or structural issues invisible to 2D

Intraoral Cameras

  • See exactly what the dentist sees with high-definition magnification
  • Helps you understand your diagnosis and feel confident in treatment
  • Early detection of cracks, decay, and gum issues

Laser Dentistry

  • Minimize discomfort and noise compared to traditional drills
  • Faster healing times and reduced bleeding for gum treatments
  • Often eliminates the need for sutures in soft-tissue procedures

Same-Day CAD/CAM Crowns

  • Go from broken tooth to final porcelain crown in a single visit
  • No messy impressions—we use advanced 3D digital scanning
  • Eliminates the need for uncomfortable temporary crowns
